project.name: Hero: IDE Bridge Phase 2: When Your 3D Scene Talks Back

data.label: Style
data.name: w33s3 Dark
data.description: Dark, moody atmosphere with high contrast lighting. Cinematic composition with neon accent colors against deep blacks. Professional photography feel, dramatic shadows, rich color depth. Modern minimalist aesthetic, no text or watermarks.

data.label: Action
data.content: Noir comic book style, muted blacks and grays with selective cyan and orange color pops. Developer silhouette at a dual-monitor command center, one screen showing a 3D viewport with geometric shapes and camera gizmos, the other showing a node-based workflow editor with connected boxes. Luminous data streams flow between the two screens like electric synapses. Dramatic low-angle lighting, deep shadows, industrial tech atmosphere. Professional cinematic composition.
